lamb-souvlaki.name: Lamb Souvlaki
instructions: Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, red wine vinegar, oregano, garlic, salt, and pepper together in a medium bowl.
Add cubed lamb and stir until lamb is coated with marinade. Cover and refrigerate 3 hours, or overnight.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate. Thread marinated lamb onto skewers, reserving any remaining marinade.
Grill skewers until desired doneness, 10 to 12 minutes, basting with the reserved marinade and turning occasionally for even cooking.
Serve and enjoy!

lavender-lemonade-with-hibiscus.name: Lavender Lemonade With Hibiscus
instructions: Mix 3 cups water and lemon juice together in a large pitcher. Refrigerate until chilled.
Bring remaining 3 cups water, sugar, lavender, and hibiscus to a boil in a medium saucepan. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 minutes, then cool.
Strain lavender-hibiscus liquid through a sieve into a pitcher; discard solids. Stir lemon water into lavender-hibiscus liquid. Refrigerate until cold.

learn-how-to-make-cream-of-chicken-and-v.name: Learn How To Make Cream Of Chicken And Vegetables
learn-how-to-make-cream-of-chicken-and-v.original_name: Aprende cómo hacer crema de pollo y verduras

ingredients.item: 255 grs.  de papa picada en cubos

instructions: En una olla a fuego medio agrega aceite de oliva e incorpora la cebolla, zanahoria, calabacitas y papa.
Mueve constantemente y deja cocinar durante 2 minutos.
Add the chicken and 4 cups of water to the pot and then have 1 bucket of chicken and pepper to taste.
Meg well and let her release her first herb, then put her down with medium-low heat and let her cook for 20 minutes or till the chicken's well cooked.
Retira la olla del fuego y deja enfriar solo un poco.
Then with the help of a food processor, everything goes quite well until the mixture is homogenous and fine.
Sirve caliente y decora con cilantro y chile en polvo.

learn-how-to-make-veracruz-style-shrimp-.name: Learn How To Make Veracruz-style Shrimp With This Recipe
learn-how-to-make-veracruz-style-shrimp-.original_name: Aprende como hacer camarones a la veracruzana con esta clásica receta

ingredients.item: ½ pounds baked and peeled shrimp

instructions: Finely paddle the onions and tomato and put them into a frying pan with an olive oil chorrit.
Fold them and add them.
Incorpora las alcaparras y las aceitunas.
Swallow a jet of lemon juice and add the shrimp.
Cocina los camarones durante 2-3 minutos.
Put a ration of shrimp to the veracruzan on a plate. Decorate with two pieces of avocado and accompany with white rice. Serves

lemon-and-blueberry-tart-teleculinaria.name: Lemon And Blueberry Tart

ingredients.item: 200 g de farinha fina para bolos

instructions: Prepare the dough: place the flour and butter, cut into cubes, in a kitchen robot or chipper and crush until a sand consistency is achieved. Lie in a bowl, add the sugar, the egg, the lemon zest and the yeast and grind well until you get a homogeneous dough. Wrap in adherent film and lead to cold for about 15 minutes.

Extend the dough, line a tart 22 cm in diameter, previously greased with butter and flour, pinch the base with a fork, cover with vegetable paper, fill with dry beans and light in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 15 minutes.

Prepare the filling: mix the eggs with sugar, cream, masena flour and lemon juice and book. Remove the dough from the oven, discard the beans and vegetable paper, fill with the previous preparation and bring it back to the oven for another 20 minutes or until it is well golden.
Retire a tarte do forno, deixe-a arrefecer, desenforme-a e sirva-a decorada com chantili e mirtilos.

lemon-arugula-salad-recipe-lezzet.name: Lemon Arugula Salad Recipe

ingredients.item: You can use baby roka, mixed greens (marul, spinach, radika).
Rokayi blends with spinach or roka-mix green, adds fullness to salad.
You can get a different flavor using lime juice instead of lemon.
Add lemon peel rendesi also gives a fresh and dense aroma.
You can create different tastes using avocado oil, walnut oil or nuts oil instead of olive oil.
Making water lighter can reduce the amount of to fat.
You can add sea salt, red pepper or water outside salt and pepper.

instructions: 1. You can wash thoroughly and wash the filter.
2. If you are using cherry tomatoes and cucumbers, chop and add it to your car.
3. Lemon juice, olive oil, salt and pepper.
4. Mix the water roka and other materiallesserine pour and lightly.
5. During the service you can s&uuml with walnut or grated parmesan cheese.
6.  Afiyet olsun.

lemon-raspberry-crumb-bars.name: Lemon Raspberry Crumb Bars
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a 9-inch square pan with enough parchment paper to hang over on all sides.

Combine 1 ½ cups flour, confectioners' sugar, and ¼ teaspoon salt in a large bowl; cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Reserve ½ cup crumb mixture; set aside for topping. Press remaining crumb mixture firmly and evenly into bottom of the prepared pan.
Bake crust in the preheated oven for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine white sugar, eggs, lemon zest, lemon juice, 2 tablespoons flour, baking powder, and remaining ¼ teaspoon salt in a large bowl.
Scatter raspberries evenly over crust; evenly pour lemon filling over raspberries, then randomly sprinkle reserved ½ cup crumb mixture over top.
Bake in the preheated oven until bars are set, 20 to 25 minutes. Cool bars completely in the pan, 30 to 45 minutes, then remove from the pan using the parchment overhang and cut into 9 bars.

lemon-pepper-catfish-nuggets-with-pepero.name: Lemon-pepper Catfish Nuggets With Peperoncini Dip

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or morton kosher salt
. diamond crystal or 2 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions:
Whisk 1 cup sour cream, ¼ cup buttermilk, and 2 Tbsp. peperoncini brine in a small bowl until smooth. Stir in 2 Tbsp. finely chopped peperoncini, 1 Tbsp. finely chopped chives, ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt, and ¼ tsp. freshly ground pepper. Cover dip and chill until ready to use.
Do Ahead: Dip can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

Rinse 2 lb. catfish fillets, preferably US–farmed, cut into 1½" pieces; pat dry. Sprinkle all over with 1 tsp. paprika and 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Transfer to a large glass or ceramic bowl and pour in 1 cup buttermilk. Cover bowl and chill 15–30 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk 1 cup rice flour, ½ cup yellow cornmeal, and 6 Tbsp. lemon-pepper seasoning in a shallow bowl to combine.
Whisk remaining 2 Tbsp. lemon-pepper seasoning and remaining 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a small bowl to combine. Set lemon-pepper salt aside.

Fit a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot with thermometer; pour in vegetable oil to come about 1½" up sides (about 8 cups) and heat over medium until thermometer registers 325°. Dredge catfish in rice flour mixture, shaking off excess. Working in 2 batches and returning oil to 325° between batches, fry catfish, turning occasionally, until golden brown and crisp, 5–7 minutes per batch. Transfer fish to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet and let drain. Immediately sprinkle all over with reserved lemon-pepper salt.
Arrange catfish nuggets and celery sticks on a platter; serve with dip alongside.

lentil-soup-with-spicy-italian-sausage.name: Lentil Soup With Spicy Italian Sausage
instructions: Heat oil in large pot over medium-high heat. Add sausage and cook until browned, stirring occasionally, about 5 minutes. Using slotted spoon, transfer sausage to bowl. Add onion, carrots, parsnips, celery, and Italian seasoning blend to drippings in pot; cook until onion is translucent and vegetables begin to soften, stirring often, 7 to 8 minutes. Add lentils; stir to coat. Add 3 quarts broth. Bring to boil; reduce heat to medium and simmer until lentils are tender, stirring occasionally and adding more broth by 1/4 cupfuls if soup is too thick, 20 minutes.
Add sausage to soup and simmer until vegetables are tender and flavors blend, 10 to 12 minutes. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Stir in spinach. Cook until spinach is wilted, about 3 minutes.

lime-and-lemon-cake-teleculinaria.name: Lime And Lemon Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 170oC. Fill with vegetable paper and grease with butter a hole form. Reserve.

In a bowl, mix the flour with yeast, bicarbonate and salt. Reserve. Beat the butter with the sugar, until you get a cute pasta. Add the eggs, one by one, beating very well between each addition. Then add the flour mixture and wrap without knocking. Then add the yogurt and the shaving and citrus juice.

Coloque a massa na forma e leve ao forno durante cerca de 40 a 45 minutos. Retire do forno e deixe arrefecer por cerca de 15 minutos. Desenforme o bolo e deixe arrefecer completamente sobre uma rede. Sirva de seguida.

loaded-baked-potato-soup.name: Loaded Baked Potato Soup
instructions: Preheat your oven to 425˚F (220˚C).
On a parchment paper-lined baking sheet, rub potatoes with salt, pepper, and olive oil.
Bake in preheated oven for 40-50 minutes.
Once cooled, peel and mash potatoes, and set aside.
Heat oil in large pot over a medium-high heat.
Add onion and garlic. Cook until translucent and garlic is fragant, about 5 minutes.
Add butter and melt.
Bring in flour and stir until mixture is lightly browned.
Add in the chicken broth and cream cheese. Stir until fully incorporated
Add in the mashed potatoes and combine.
Season with salt and pepper.
Garnish bowl with shredded cheese, bacon, and chives.
Enjoy!

loaded-hot-dogs.name: Loaded Hot Dogs
instructions: For the curried mustard sauce, combine all the ingredients in a small saucepan over a medium heat and simmer  for 2 minutes. Blend with a hand blender or in a food processor until smooth and set aside to cool.
For the onion rings: Heat the sunflower oil over a medium-high heat until it reaches 180°C. (Test this before frying by placing one ring in the oil. If it bubbles immediately, the oil is ready.)
Stir all the dry ingredients together in a large mixing bowl. Combine the almond milk and coconut cream in a separate mixing bowl.

Dip each onion ring into the dry mixture, then dip into the wet mixture and then back into the dry mixture. Fry the rings in batches until golden and crisp (1–2 minutes). Drain on a paper towel and set aside.
For the salsa, combine all the ingredients in a bowl.

Lightly chargrill the hot dog sausages on a barbecue grid over medium-hot coals until heated all the way through. Slice each roll, lengthways, without cutting all the way through. Spread the roll with the curried mustard sauce, then add the hot dog sausages and top with salsa and onion rings. Add some vegan cheese for an extra treat.
Serve.

loaded-scalloped-potatoes.name: Loaded Scalloped Potatoes

ingredients.item: . plus 2 tsp. diamond crystal or 1 tbsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: dark green parts only, thinly sliced on a diagonal

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 375°. Cook 12 oz. bacon (about 12 slices), cut into ¼" pieces, in a medium skillet over medium heat, stirring often, until brown and crisp, 6–8 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer bacon to paper towels to drain.

Spoon 3 Tbsp. bacon fat into a medium saucepan; discard or reserve remaining fat for another use. Add 6 garlic cloves, finely grated, 3 cups heavy cream, 1 Tbsp. plus 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 Tbsp. Morton kosher salt, and 2 tsp. freshly ground pepper, set over medium heat, and cook, stirring occasionally, just until salt is dissolved, about 1 minute (it doesn’t need to be hot). Remove from heat.

Peel 5 lb. russet potatoes (about 10 large) and, using mandoline, slice into about ¹⁄₁₆"-thick rounds. Pour a third of the cream mixture into a 13x9" baking dish. Arrange potato slices in dish, fanning out a handful at a time so they overlap slightly and pressing down gently in between additions to compress, until all potatoes have been used and bottom of dish is covered. Pour remaining cream mixture over; press down on potatoes so they’re mostly submerged. Cover dish tightly with foil; bake until potatoes are tender, 60–70 minutes (a tester inserted in the middle should meet with barely any resistance). Remove foil, scatter 3 oz. sharp yellow cheddar, coarsely grated (about 1 cup), over, and continue to bake, uncovered, until cheese is melted, 6–8 minutes more.

Let scalloped potatoes cool 5 minutes, then top with small dollops of ⅓ cup sour cream and scatter 4 scallions, dark green parts only, thinly sliced on a diagonal, and bacon over.
Do Ahead: Scalloped potatoes (without cheese and toppings) can be made 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Reheat, covered, in a 350° oven 20 minutes, then uncover, top with cheese, and cook until melted, 7–9 minutes.

lobster-noodle-soup.name: Lobster Noodle Soup

ingredients.prep: fronds removed, bulb cored, thinly sliced
white and pale-green parts only, thinly sliced into rings
parsley leaves, cilantro leaves, thinly sliced fresh chiles, and lemon wedges (for serving)

instructions: Bring 6 quarts water to a boil in a large stockpot. Add lobsters, cover, and cook 8–10 minutes. Transfer lobsters to a rimmed baking sheet. Let sit until cool enough to handle, then separate claws and tails from bodies; return bodies to pot. Add corn cobs, sliced fennel, leek, eggplants, mushrooms, broccoli rabe, tomato paste, Old Bay seasoning, and 1 pint cherry tomatoes. Pick meat from tails and claws; set meat aside. Add shells to pot and bring to a boil. Cook, stirring occasionally and adding water as needed to keep everything submerged, until liquid is opaque, thick, and very flavorful, 50–60 minutes.

Using a slotted spoon, remove solids from lobster broth; discard (you want to get rid of the shells and cobs, but don’t worry about getting every last aromatic); season with salt. Add linguine and cook, stirring occasionally, until al dente, 8–10 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in corn kernels, radishes, 1 cup basil, and remaining cherry tomatoes.

Chop reserved lobster meat into bite-size pieces; drizzle with oil just to coat. Divide linguine and broth among bowls and top with lobster meat, fennel fronds, parsley, cilantro, chiles, and more basil. Squeeze lemons over top; drizzle with oil.

loopys-baked-apple-crisp.name: Loopy's Baked Apple Crisp
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray an 8x8-inch baking dish with cooking spray.
Stir cream cheese, brown sugar, maple syrup, walnuts, cinnamon, vanilla extract, nutmeg, and allspice together in a bowl until well mixed.

Place apples, cut-side up, into baking dish, supporting them with pieces from the core underneath if needed. Spoon 1 1/2 teaspoons butter into each cored apple and top each with 1/2 the cream cheese mixture, filling the hole and covering the entire top of apple.

Bake in the preheated oven until apples are slightly softened, about 35 minutes. Sprinkle apples with granola, pressing granola into filling. Continue baking until apples are cooked through and granola is browned, about 10 more minutes.

low-carb-keto-lasagna.name: Low-carb Keto Lasagna
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Use a vegetable peeler to create long, thin slices of zucchini, avoiding the seedy center. Lay slices on paper towels and sprinkle lightly with salt. Let sit at least 15 minutes.

Place ground beef in a skillet over medium heat; add olive oil, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon black pepper. Add tomato sauce, vinegar, 1 teaspoon parsley, garlic paste, basil paste, onion powder, and red pepper flakes. Cover skillet, reduce heat, and simmer sauce 15 minutes.
Mix ricotta cheese, 1 tablespoon parsley, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon black pepper together in a bowl.

Layer 1/3 of the sauce into a 9x13-inch glass baking dish. Add 1/2 the sliced zucchini and 1/2 the ricotta cheese mixture. Repeat layering another 1/3 of the sauce, remaining zucchini, remaining ricotta mixture, and remaining sauce. Top with mozzarella cheese. Coat a sheet of aluminum foil with cooking spray and cover lasagna with it, oiled-side down.
Bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes. Remove aluminum foil and continue baking until bubbly and browned, 5 to 10 minutes more.

loznik-vine-leaf-pita-lezzet.name: Loznik Vine Leaf Pita
instructions: 1. Mix a deep coarse yogurt and corn flour.
2. Pırasa, finely chop and add fresh onions and parsleys into it.
3. Mix well by adding sugar, salt and water.
4. In this way, you will get a fractional consistency.
5. If the consistency is too dark, you can add azar water.
6. Boil the vine leaves in boiling water for 3 minutes and immediately remove it.
7. Lightly lubricate a nonstick pan.
8. Suspended leaves index veined parts in a row.
9. Provide the paddy leaves from the edge of the ceiling.
10. Discharge the prepared part into the hanging leaves and close it right on the wrapped leaves.
11. 11. After filling the remaining gaps in the edges with the vine leaf, open the golden of the stove.
12. Bake an average of 15 minutes.
13. After 15 minutes, reverse face with the oven tray and cook the other side in the same way.
14 July Serve together with your dimniki sour rite.
15.  Afiyet olsun.
16. What are the Diamond Points of the Loznik Recipe?Loznik is actually prepared with fresh vine leaves.

19. September You can use unburned yogurt or sour rite in the recipe.

luau-coconut.name: Luau Coconut
instructions: Bring sugar and 1/4 cup water to boil in small saucepan over medium- high heat, stirring until sugar dissolves. Cool simple syrup.

Cut off top 2 inches of coconuts; reserve coconut water. Mix 1/4 cup simple syrup, coconut milk, light rum, gold rum, lime juice, pineapple juice, and 1/2 cup reserved coconut water in large cocktail shaker. Fill with ice; cover and shake vigorously 20 times. Pour contents of shaker into coconuts, dividing equally (do not strain). Garnish each with lime slice and maraschino cherry. Serve with straw and spoon for scraping out fresh coconut from inside of shell.
